pageTitle: cyYou need to apply for help with your application fee
caption: cyMake an application
heading: cyYou need to apply for help with your application fee
youNeedToApplyBeforeContinuing: cyYou need to apply for Help with Fees (GOV.UK, opens in new tab) before you can continue with this application.
enterCourtFormNumber: cyEnter the court form number ‘N244’ when asked. This will be one of the first questions when you apply for help with your fees.
afterYouHaveApplied: cyAfter you have applied you will receive a Help with Fees reference number. You should enter the reference number when you return to this application.
ifYouReceiveAnyBenefit: cyIf you receive any benefit that qualifies you for Help with Fees, you must include evidence of it when you apply online for Help with Fees.
ifYouHaveYourHWFReference: cyIf you have your Help with Fees reference number you can enter it here.
